summary: A solid matrix recording captures a short but intense show with Jerry on fire, highlighted by a Stephen tease in Not Fade Away and a stellar Lost Sailor > Saint jam.
review: Both reviewers praise the performance – the first set is described as excellent aside from a slow‑starting Mississippi Half-Step, while the second set delivers a rare Stephen tease at Not Fade Away and an explosive Lost Sailor > Saint transition. The recording is mainly audience‑sourced with occasional soundboard feed, giving it decent clarity overall.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (high praise for Jerry and key jams) combined with a generally good matrix recording yields an above‑average rating despite limited review count.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mostly audience tape with the soundboard (sbd) kicking in after a while; overall clear enough to enjoy, no major drop‑outs noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Short but intense show – first set solid overall, second set delivers a surprising Stephen tease and an exceptional jam out of Saint leading into the drums.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry is described as 'on fire' and dominant throughout the performance.
